metadata.job_summary: Investment role at a growing Swiss real estate debt platform specializing in mezzanine and structured financing. Focus on underwriting, financial analysis, risk assessment, and deal execution from origination through post-closing monitoring. Entrepreneurial environment with rapid growth trajectory and hundreds of millions CHF in transactions.

research.company_mission: Innovative Swiss real estate investment platform specializing in structured financing of real estate projects, serving private and institutional investors with mezzanine and structured debt solutions.
research.recent_news: Swiss real estate debt market growing with platforms like Daneo and SwissLending financing hundreds of millions CHF in projects. The sector offers attractive CHF-denominated returns with secured real estate liens and LTV ratios up to 80%.

resume.professional_summary: Transaction-focused MSc Finance candidate with debt advisory and structuring experience across 7+ mandates up to CHF 50M. Autonomous and entrepreneurial profile developed in a lean deal team, combining rigorous financial modeling with hands-on due diligence coordination. Strong fit for high-growth environments requiring independent execution and analytical rigor.
auraia_bullets: Staffed on 7 live mandates including debt advisory across healthcare, tech, and life sciences sectors with deal values EUR 5M-50M, managing full transaction lifecycle from origination through closing and post-deal monitoring

Built detailed financial models (LBO, DCF, trading comps, precedent transactions) and conducted quality of earnings analysis to assess investment risks and key value drivers for client and Board presentations

Coordinated with legal, tax, and accounting advisors to structure transactions, supervising comprehensive due diligence processes (juridique, technique, financiere) across multiple concurrent mandates
resume.rc_bullet: Conducted financial and operational due diligence on 3 acquisition targets with revenues EUR 10M-30M, preparing investment memos with market analysis, competitive positioning, financial projections, and synergy assessments for investment committee
resume.europ_bullet: Built automated financial dashboards in Excel and PowerBI to track KPIs for CHF 50M+ revenue subsidiary, performed variance analysis on monthly P&L, supported quarterly forecasting for 5 business units, and developed cost allocation and profitability models
leadership_bullets: McKinsey Case Finalist: Developed data-driven model to forecast market events using statistical analysis, presenting to executives with potential CHF 200K annual revenue impact
Screeny.ai Founder: Built AI software for investment banks to identify acquirers, reducing buyer search time from 10+ hours to 20 minutes, adopted by 3 advisory firms
Portfolio Manager: Manages diversified investment portfolio using options strategies, generating 8% annualized returns through disciplined risk management
resume.courses: Fixed Income and Credit Risk, Valuation, Corporate Finance, Risk Management
resume.skills: Financial Modeling | Risk Analysis | Due Diligence | Excel | French/English/German

cover_letter.subject: **Subject:** Application for Investment Associate - Real Estate Debt Position
cover_letter.intro: I'm interested in real estate debt because it combines transaction execution with tangible asset backing - you're not just moving paper, you're financing something real. The Swiss market is growing fast, and a platform focused on mezzanine and structured solutions is exactly where I want to apply my deal experience.
cover_letter.body:
I've spent the past year executing transactions in a lean M&A team - 7+ mandates including debt advisory, deal values up to CHF 50M, full lifecycle from origination through closing. I built the financial models, ran the due diligence coordination, and prepared investment memos for committee presentations. The autonomy required to manage multiple deals simultaneously in a small team is directly relevant to a high-growth platform where you can't wait for instructions.
I also founded Screeny.ai and got it adopted by 3 advisory firms, which taught me how to build something from scratch in a fast-moving environment. That entrepreneurial experience matters in a growing platform where processes are still being built.
cover_letter.closing: I'd welcome the opportunity to discuss how my transaction background fits your team's needs.

email.subject: Application - Investment Associate Real Estate Debt - Adrian Turion (JN-122025-6902059)

Dear Mr. Socratidis,

With hands-on experience in debt advisory and transaction structuring from my M&A roles, I am well-positioned to contribute to underwriting and deal execution for real estate financing solutions. My background executing 7+ mandates with deal values up to CHF 50M aligns directly with the analytical and transactional demands of this role.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.
